title: Confirm LilyGO hardware facts from source material
description: Why this exists: board files and HAL descriptors must be based on confirmed pinouts and component variants, not community memory. What needs to be done: collect official LilyGO schematics/docs, Meshtastic board definitions, PlatformIO variants, Zephyr upstream board status if any, and driver requirements for MCU, LoRa radio, display, input, GNSS, PMIC, battery ADC, external flash/storage, reset/boot pins, and charging/power controls. Acceptance criteria: source provenance is recorded; pin map is complete enough for Zephyr devicetree; uncertain pins/components are filed as follow-up Beads; any revision-specific differences are documented.
notes: Hardware facts confirmed 2026-06-30 for standard LilyGO T-Deck target. Sources: official LilyGO T-Deck repo README (https://github.com/Xinyuan-LilyGO/T-Deck) and official examples/UnitTest/utilities.h; Meshtastic firmware shallow clone at commit 23bb55d96525314107f5da27ff9173924333e80f, variants/esp32s3/t-deck/variant.h, variant.cpp, and boards/t-deck.json. MCU/flash/PSRAM: Meshtastic board json names ESP32-S3, 16 MB flash, 8 MB PSRAM, Wi-Fi/Bluetooth/LoRa connectivity, USB CDC on boot in Arduino config. Power: GPIO10 is peripheral power enable and must be driven high early; Meshtastic earlyInitVariant says it powers keyboard ESP32-C3, audio amp, TF card, display backlight, trackball, ES7210. SPI bus: shared by TFT, SD, and LoRa on SCK=40/MOSI=41/MISO=38; LoRa CS=9, TFT CS=12, SD CS=39 should idle high. SX126x: CS=9, reset=17, busy=13, DIO1 IRQ=45, DIO2 internal RF switch, DIO3 TCXO voltage 1.8 V per Meshtastic; local DTS currently needs TCXO correction. Display/input: ST7789 240x320 on shared SPI, DC=11, BL=42, reset=-1; GT911 touch interrupt=16 at I2C address 0x5d; keyboard uses I2C SDA=18/SCL=8, address 0x55, interrupt/backlight signal GPIO46; trackball directions GPIO1/2/3/15 and press GPIO0. Battery/GNSS/audio: battery ADC GPIO4 with divider; GPS default not present, optional shield UART uses RX=44/TX=43; mic/amp pins are present but not first-scope LICHEN dependencies. Revision uncertainty: public sources distinguish T-Deck Plus/Pro variants; created project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.13 to confirm physical board revision before flash/hardware smoke. Display/input driver details remain under project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.7; power/battery/GNSS under project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.8.
close_reason: Confirmed standard LilyGO T-Deck hardware facts from official LilyGO sources and Meshtastic current variant source; recorded pin map, peripheral boundaries, TCXO correction, and revision uncertainty follow-up.
